description: Translation mapping from WORK_PACKET V1 to WORK_PACKET V2. Enables backwards-compatible reading of V1 packets during phase-out period. V1 write support is discontinued.

id.notes: V1 id becomes V2 work_packet_id. If V1 id is not UUID format, generate new UUID and log original id.

change_type.notes: V1 had 4 types; V2 has 4 different types. Feature and architectural both map to build. Fix maps to refactor.

allowed_paths.notes: V1 allowed_paths becomes V2 file_targets. Semantics identical: scope containment.

summary.notes: V1 summary becomes V2 scope. V2 scope is a declarative boundary statement.

timestamp.notes: V2 work packets receive new timestamps at translation time.

orbt_mode.notes: V1 packets have no orbt_mode. Default to operate for translation only. New packets MUST declare mode explicitly.

execution_type.notes: V1 packets have no execution_type. Default to standard for translation only.

target_repo.notes: V1 did not include target_repo. Must be provided by operator. Infer from execution context if available.

target_branch.notes: V1 did not include target_branch. Must be provided by operator.

acceptance_criteria.notes: Must be derived from V1 summary or provided manually. Each criterion must be mechanically verifiable.

schema_impact.notes: If V1 architectural_flag=true, set schema_impact=true. Otherwise requires manual determination.

required_artifacts.notes: V1 did not declare required artifacts explicitly. Must be provided by operator.

fields_dropped_from_v1.architectural_flag: Superseded by schema_impact + file_targets analysis. Architectural elevation now detected by audit_rules.json RULE-008.
fields_dropped_from_v1.requires_pressure_test: Superseded by certification layer. All work packets go through certification regardless.
fields_dropped_from_v1.flow_contract: Superseded by WORK_PACKET V2 scope + file_targets. Flow validation moved to audit_rules.json.
fields_dropped_from_v1.payload: Removed. No opaque payload. All governance fields are explicit and required.

deprecation_timeline.v1_read_support: Active until next major doctrine version bump (4.0.0).
deprecation_timeline.v1_write_support: Discontinued immediately. All new work packets must use V2 schema.
